hero.title: Arrkiii Latest
hero.description: A feature-rich, modern Discord bot with a beautiful UI, best-in-class music system, advanced moderation, and automation tools. Built with the latest JavaScript libraries and MongoDB for performance and reliability.

featuresSection.title: Everything Your Server Needs
featuresSection.description: Arrkiii is packed with features to create a vibrant and secure community.

features.title: Music System
features.description: High-quality, lag-free music supporting YouTube, Spotify, and more with playlists and lyrics.

features.title: Aesthetic UI
features.description: Canvas-based welcome banners, profile cards, and customizable templates.

features.title: Security & Moderation
features.description: Advanced anti-nuke, automod for spam/mentions, and full moderation tools.

features.title: Automation & Roles
features.description: Auto-responder, auto-react, auto-pfp, and voice role assignment.

features.title: Fun & Utility
features.description: Engaging games, memes, interactive commands, user profiles, and leveling.

features.title: Modern Tech Stack
features.description: Built with discord.js, Kazagumo, Shoukaku, and Mongoose for performance.
